kill_fact: No clean kill: every load-bearing bear fact verifies against primary sources, so the bearish/PASS thesis survives. The would-be kill (a hard, signed contract that de-risks the option) does NOT exist — the $900M DOE task order 'remains subject to negotiation of a definitive agreement' and the Oklo deal is an explicit Letter of Intent with 2029 first deliveries and only 'potential' prepayments. Both load-bearing catalysts are confirmed NON-binding, FCF is confirmed negative (Q1-26 ~ -$58M; OCF -$35.1M, capex $23.2M), and the stock is confirmed ~59% off its $464.25 52-wk high yet still ~70x — the 2029+ option is richly priced and unsigned, exactly as the bear claims.
corrections: STALE/INACCURATE ANCHOR in the dossier+bear: Q1-2026 revenue was $76.7M, UP ~5% YoY (not 'flat-to-down'). The 'flat revenue' framing is a TTM artifact; the most recent quarter actually grew. Net income $10.0M down ~63% YoY ($27.2M prior) is CONFIRMED, but the cause is contract-timing/below-the-line, not demand erosion. FY26 guide was RAISED to $450-500M (from $425-475M). sop_fair_value $150 is built on the correct, current (Q1-26 reported 2026-05-05) financials and the correct non-binding catalyst status — it is NOT stale. Net cash ~$0.66B, $1.9B cash, $3.9B backlog, and 'did not access ATM' all verify. Net effect of the correction is marginally LESS bearish on the run-rate (recent quarter grew), but does not change the verdict: you are still paying ~27% above base-case SoP for unsigned 2029+ optionality.
evidence: SEC 8-K (Centrus, filed 2026-05-05), Q1-2026 results: revenue $76.7M (+5% YoY), net income $10.0M, FY26 guidance raised to $450-500M; $900.0M DOE task order 'remains subject to negotiation of a definitive agreement' + funded $108.2M option year — https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/0001065059/000162828026030674/ex991-10q2026_05x05.htm

SEC 8-K / PR (Oklo-Centrus, 2026-06-18): Letter of Intent to supply HALEU for up to five Aurora powerhouses (1.2 GW S. Ohio campus), deliveries 'scheduled to begin in 2029,' only 'potential' prepayments 'to be further negotiated in a future definitive agreement' — https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/oklo-centrus-sign-letter-of-intent-to-purchase-nuclear-fuel-for-aurora-powerhouse-deployment-in-southern-ohio-302804265.html

Centrus Q1-2026 FCF negative: -$58.3M FCF for the quarter (OCF -$35.1M on inventory/working-capital builds, capex $23.2M), confirming the cash-consuming-build thesis — https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/LEU/10-q-centrus-energy-corp-quarterly-earnings-report-bcd93b464f33.html

Stockanalysis/Yahoo (2026-06-21): 52-wk high $464.25, price ~$190 (~59% off high) yet ~70x P/E — the AI-power option ran hard, partly de-rated, still richly valued — https://stockanalysis.com/stocks/leu/
